name: Vaccine Tax Refund and Credit Coordination

eligibility.description: Manufacturers, producers, or importers of taxable vaccines who have overpaid excise taxes or meet criteria for tax-free sales/exports.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers who pay the excise tax on vaccines under section 4131 are entitled to specific repayments or credits under section 4132(b) and section 6416 if vaccines are exported or returned.
